examples: The houseboat can also be used as a combined home and office.
I sold my houseboat in Bristol and gave up my job at an organic food company.
Another time I had accompanied my father on a trip on the Ganges in his houseboat.
Named a klotok, this is a quaint wooden Indonesian houseboat that comfortably sleeps four people.
